requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio Type Approval for Power Banks with Wireless Functions
requirement_topic.zh: 带无线功能移动电源的电磁兼容与无线型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: 帶無線功能行動電源的電磁相容與無線型號核准

summary.en: Cambodia does not operate a single CE-style EMC mark. A plain power bank without radio functions falls under the general ISC standards/import-inspection framework rather than a dedicated horizontal EMC directive. However, where a power bank includes a wireless function （e.g. wireless charging coils that emit, Bluetooth, or Wi-Fi）, the radio/telecom aspects are regulated by the Telecommunication Regulator of Cambodia （TRC）, which requires type approval/registration of radio equipment before it is imported, sold, or operated. EMC characteristics are typically assessed against IEC/CISPR-based references through ISC-adopted CS standards or as part of the TRC type-approval submission. The exporter should confirm with TRC whether the specific wireless feature triggers type approval and assemble the matching test reports.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨没有单一的CE式EMC标志。无无线功能的普通移动电源纳入通用ISC标准/进口检验框架，而非专门的横向EMC指令。但当移动电源含无线功能（如发射型无线充电线圈、蓝牙或Wi-Fi）时，其无线/电信部分由柬埔寨电信监管局（TRC）监管，TRC要求无线设备在进口、销售或使用前完成型号核准/注册。EMC特性通常依据基于IEC/CISPR的参考、通过ISC采用的CS标准评估，或作为TRC型号核准申报的一部分评估。出口商应向TRC确认特定无线功能是否触发型号核准，并整理相应的检测报告。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨沒有單一的CE式EMC標誌。無無線功能的普通行動電源納入通用ISC標準/進口檢驗框架，而非專門的橫向EMC指令。但當行動電源含無線功能（如發射型無線充電線圈、藍牙或Wi-Fi）時，其無線/電信部分由柬埔寨電信監管局（TRC）監管，TRC要求無線設備在進口、銷售或使用前完成型號核准/註冊。EMC特性通常依據基於IEC/CISPR的參考、通過ISC採用的CS標準評估，或作為TRC型號核准申報的一部分評估。出口商應向TRC確認特定無線功能是否觸發型號核准，並整理相應的檢測報告。

standards_or_laws: Telecommunication Regulator of Cambodia （TRC） — radio equipment type approval / registration
ISC-adopted CS standards based on IEC/CISPR EMC references
No single CE-style horizontal EMC marking regime

summary.en: In China, EMC for electronic products is addressed through national GB EMC standards and, where the product or its host equipment is in the CCC catalogue, through CCC certification which includes EMC testing. Wireless functions （Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, wireless charging） require an SRRC （State Radio Regulation of China） type approval. These Chinese approvals （CCC, SRRC, GB EMC reports） are domestic and are not recognised by the TRC of Cambodia or under the ISC framework.
summary.zh: 在中国，电子产品的EMC通过国家GB EMC标准处理；当产品或其宿主设备列入CCC目录时，通过包含EMC测试的CCC认证处理。无线功能（蓝牙、Wi-Fi、无线充电）需取得SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准。这些中国批准（CCC、SRRC、GB EMC报告）属国内性质，不被柬埔寨TRC或ISC框架认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，電子產品的EMC通過國家GB EMC標準處理；當產品或其宿主設備列入CCC目錄時，通過包含EMC測試的CCC認證處理。無線功能（藍牙、Wi-Fi、無線充電）需取得SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准。這些中國批准（CCC、SRRC、GB EMC報告）屬國內性質，不被柬埔寨TRC或ISC框架認可。

standards_or_laws: CCC certification including EMC where catalogue-listed
SRRC type approval for radio/wireless functions

gap.en: There is no single CE-style EMC mark to obtain for Cambodia; the split is by function. A wireless-equipped power bank needs separate TRC type approval/registration for its radio part, which Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy. EMC evidence is assessed against IEC/CISPR-based CS references rather than Chinese GB EMC reports. Key gaps: （1） TRC type approval is required before import for any in-scope radio function; （2） SRRC and Chinese GB EMC reports are not recognised; （3） the exporter must confirm with TRC whether the specific wireless feature is in scope and prepare IEC/CISPR-aligned test reports plus importer documentation.
gap.zh: 柬埔寨没有单一的CE式EMC标志可取得，按功能拆分。带无线的移动电源需为其无线部分单独取得TRC型号核准/注册，中国SRRC批准无法满足。EMC证据依据基于IEC/CISPR的CS参考评估，而非中国GB EMC报告。主要差距：（1）任何在范围内的无线功能在进口前需取得TRC型号核准；（2）SRRC及中国GB EMC报告不被认可；（3）出口商须向TRC确认特定无线功能是否在范围内，并准备符合IEC/CISPR的检测报告及进口商文件。
gap.zht: 柬埔寨沒有單一的CE式EMC標誌可取得，按功能拆分。帶無線的行動電源需為其無線部分單獨取得TRC型號核准/註冊，中國SRRC批准無法滿足。EMC證據依據基於IEC/CISPR的CS參考評估，而非中國GB EMC報告。主要差距：（1）任何在範圍內的無線功能在進口前需取得TRC型號核准；（2）SRRC及中國GB EMC報告不被認可；（3）出口商須向TRC確認特定無線功能是否在範圍內，並準備符合IEC/CISPR的檢測報告及進口商文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope radio functions — TRC type approval/registration required before import, sale or operation of wireless-equipped products; plain power banks fall under general ISC standards/import inspection rather than a CE-style EMC mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB EMC standards apply; CCC where catalogue-listed; SRRC type approval required for radio/wireless functions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia has no single CE-style EMC mark. A plain power bank sits under general ISC standards/import inspection, but any wireless function requires separate TRC radio type approval before import. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and GB EMC approvals are domestic and not recognised. Exporters should confirm TRC scope for the specific wireless feature and prepare IEC/CISPR-aligned EMC and radio test reports. Verify current TRC and ISC requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨没有单一的CE式EMC标志。普通移动电源纳入通用ISC标准/进口检验，但任何无线功能在进口前需单独取得TRC无线型号核准。中国CCC、SRRC及GB EMC批准属国内性质，不被认可。出口商应向TRC确认特定无线功能的适用范围，并准备符合IEC/CISPR的EMC及无线检测报告。发货前请核实TRC及ISC的现行要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨沒有單一的CE式EMC標誌。普通行動電源納入通用ISC標準/進口檢驗，但任何無線功能在進口前需單獨取得TRC無線型號核准。中國CCC、SRRC及GB EMC批准屬國內性質，不被認可。出口商應向TRC確認特定無線功能的適用範圍，並準備符合IEC/CISPR的EMC及無線檢測報告。發貨前請核實TRC及ISC的現行要求。
